initial_draft:
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1/4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I have no resources to trade, so I cannot accept this proposal. However, I can reject it, which would end the game immediately with both players losing everything. Since I have nothing to lose, I might as well reject the proposal. </reason>
<player answer> REJECT </player answer>
<message> I have no resources to accept your proposal. I will reject it. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:

3. Opponent plausibility: OK. Player BLUE has no resources, so accepting the trade is not possible. Rejecting is the only logical move.

4. Consistency: OK. The <reason>, <player answer>, and <message> are all consistent with each other.

5. Rule compliance: OK. The response adheres to the rules, as Player BLUE is on Move 1/4 and is allowed to reject the proposal.
</critique>
